titleStmt.title: SII 5.985: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 985. (A.R. No. 120 of 1896). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmar tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cīvikkiramapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 5 vatu dhanu nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣa ttu Aṣṭa miyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Irevatiṉāḷ naṭuvināṭāṉa
Irācarāca vaḷanāṭṭup paṭṭāṉpākkanāṭṭuc coḻakulavallinallūr meyūra milaiyaṅkiḻāṉ maṉṟilkuṉikkum perumāḷāṉa tipattaraiyaṟku Irācātarācavaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār
tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyār tevatāṉak kuṭimakkaḷil cempaṅkuṭaiyāṉ coṟaṉum paṟṟamuṭaiyāṉ vaḷḷalum Ivviruvom Upaya Icaivu tiṭṭuk kuṭuttaparicāvatu Ivar tamakku naṉṟāka
Uṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyār tiruvuṇṇāḻikaikkuḷḷut tiruppuṟakkuṭaiyil Ivar vaiytta tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukkut tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi tirucciṟṟam
palamuṭaiyāṉ kuṟaiyil kāveriāṟu Uṭaiyntu maṭuvāy nirnilaiāṉa nilattu cipaṇṭārattut toḷāyiraṅ kācu Oṭukki caṇṭecurapperuvilaiy koṇṭa nilamāy tiruttuk kūlikku tampa
kkal nāṅkaḷ Eṇpatiṉkala nellu paṟṟit tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka tirutti neyḷakka Eṅkaḷukku kāṇiyāka nāṅkaḷ paṟṟiṉa nilattukku Ellaiāvatu kāverikkarai tāḻaiyūr nāṭāḻvāṉ ka
raikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai kampiyar tiruviḷakkuppuṟam nāṟpatteṇṇāyirap piccaṉum tiruvakampaṭip piccaṉum nilattukku teṟkkum kiḻpāṟ kellai paṇaittoḷipākap piccaṉ
nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai tillaimuvāyirattoruvan tiruviḷakkuppuṟattukku vaṭakkum meṟkkum kamukutirunantavaṉattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉku Ellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa kuḻi 6 100- ṉā
l nilam Āṟu vaṭakkaṭaiya cempaṅkuṭaiyāṉ coṟaṉ nilam muṉṟumāvum teṉmeṟkaṭaiya paṟṟamuṭaiyāṉ vaḷḷal nilam muṉṟumāvum Āka nilam Āṟumāvum Eṅkaḷukkuk kāṇiy
yākak kaikkoṇṭu nāṅkaḷ veṇṭum payir ceytukoṇṭu tevarkaḷnāyaṉ kālāle nāḷ Oṉṟuk kuḻakku neyyāka Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku toṇṇūṟṟu Orunāḻi Uḻakkāka vanta ney Aiñcāvatiṉ Etirāmā
ṇṭu Aṟpacimātam mutal cipaṇṭārattile Aḷakka kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭiyāl vanta tiruviḷakku ney nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ vaṟkkattārum Eṅkaḷpakkal peṟṟuṭaiyārum Ivarperāl tiruviḷakku
ppecic cantirātittavaraiyum Aḷakkakkaṭavomākac cammatittu Upaiya Icaivutiṭṭukkuṭuttom cempaṅkuṭaiyāṉ coṟaṉum paṟṟamuṭaiyāṉ vaḷḷalum Ivviruvom Itu paṟṟamuṭai
yāṉ vaḷḷal kaiymmāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivai paṟṟamuṭaiyāṉ civatāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Itu cempaṅkuṭaiyāṉ coṟaṉ kaiymāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivai Ātamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ puvaṉietta Āṭuvāṉ
Eḻuttu Iṉṉilattukku caṇḍeśvara pperuvilaipramā ṇattukku Eḻuttiṭṭār Āticaṇḍeśvarade var Aruḷāl koyiṟkaṇakku kuṟampiluṭaiyāṉ tiruvakampaṭippiriyaṉ koyiṟka
ṇakku neṟkuppai Uṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalappiriyaṉ tevarkaṉmi nāvuṭaipperumāṉ tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaṉ cīmāheśvara kaṅkāṇi maruntāṇṭār cikāriyam ceyāṉamuṭaiyāṉ
tevāṇṭāṉ Aruḷāl Itu veṭṭiṉe ṉālāyira Ācārya ṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 5.985 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
